hero.title: AI that earns its place in your business.
hero.subtitle: We build websites, then we make them think — chatbots, document assistants, and automation, built by the two people you actually talk to.

trust.line: a father–son studio. amsterdam × chișinău. you talk to the person who builds it.

services.title: what we do
services.intro: a website gets you online. what we build on top of it makes the website work — answering questions, reading your documents, predicting what's next, and doing the repetitive parts for you.

items.name: websites
items.body: fast, multilingual, and built to last — the front door to everything else.

items.name: chatbots & llm integration
items.body: assistants that answer in your customer's language, grounded in what your business actually knows — not generic guesses.

items.name: document assistants
items.body: point one at your contracts, manuals, and reports, then just ask. every answer comes with its source.

items.name: ml & predictive analytics
items.body: forecasting, scoring, and classification on your own data — built only where the numbers earn their keep.

items.name: ai automation
items.body: the repetitive work between your tools, handled quietly in the background so your people don't have to.

work.title: see it for real
work.intro: we'd rather show you than tell you. real work we've designed and built — and a demo clinic where you can talk to the kind of ai assistant we'd add to your own site.

items.name: Riverbend Physiotherapy
items.body: a demo clinic site we built to show the ai in action — a friendly intake assistant that asks about your problem, suggests a treatment, and explains a first visit, right there on the page. go ahead and talk to it.

items.name: Portativ SRL
items.body: a four-language site for an electrical-installations contractor — clean, fast, and easy for customers to navigate.

items.name: Nook
items.body: a calm web product for the working body — proof we care as much about feel and restraint as we do about code.

work.note: and the assistant on this page? that's ours too — a live demo of exactly what we'd build into your site.

process.title: how we work
process.intro: no project managers, no salespeople, no handoffs. four steps — both of us, from first call to launch.

items.name: a free call
items.body: we listen to what you actually need, and tell you honestly whether ai belongs in it yet.

items.name: a scoped plan
items.body: a clear plan with a fixed shape and an honest price range — before anyone commits.

items.name: we build, in the open
items.body: you follow progress on a real link as it happens, not a slide deck at the end.

items.name: launch & stay
items.body: we ship it, watch it run, and stay reachable. you always know who built it.

proof.title: who we are
proof.intro: two people, two generations, one studio. the whole point is that you talk to us directly — no layers in between.

items.name: Leonid
items.body: decades of hands-on software development — the kind of judgment that only comes from building real systems, year after year, and keeping them working.

items.name: Danila
items.body: a third-year ai student in amsterdam, working day to day with the current generation of models — llms, rag, and automation — and how to make them behave in production.

pricing.title: pricing
pricing.intro: honest starting points, not a menu. where a project lands depends on scope — which we work out together, on a call, for free.

tiers.name: website
tiers.body: a fast, multilingual site built to last. everything starts here.

tiers.name: website + ai assistant
tiers.body: a site with a live, cost-controlled assistant that answers your customers in their own language.

tiers.name: custom ai
tiers.body: document assistants, predictive models, and automation — scoped to a real, measured use case.

pricing.footnote: every project scoped after a free call.

contact.title: contact
contact.body: tell us what you're trying to do. you'll hear back from one of the two people who'd actually build it — usually within a day.

chat.title: ask kaolin
chat.intro: hi — ask me anything about what we build, how we work, or what it costs. i'm a live demo of the kind of assistant we'd put on your site.
chat.disclaimer: a live demo · answers may be imperfect
chat.error: something went wrong. please try again in a moment.
chat.rateLimited: you're going a little fast — give it a minute, then try again.

footer.tagline: websites that think. built by two people, not an agency.
